use_cases: Form submission triggers in authentication and data entry interfaces
Navigation action triggers in dashboards and admin panels
Call-to-action buttons in marketing and landing pages
Interactive controls in modal dialogs and overlays
Icon or compact action buttons in toolbars and command interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI's Slot primitive for flexible composition and class-variance-authority for scalable variant management. Supports multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles with responsive sizing options and accessible focus states.
